Class DefaultTacletTranslator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.DefaultTacletTranslator
All Implemented Interfaces:
SkeletonGenerator
public class DefaultTacletTranslator extends Object
Translates a rewrite taclet to a formula.

  • Field Summary

    DEFAULT_TACLET_TRANSLATOR

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected JTerm
    getFindFromTaclet(FindTaclet findTaclet)
    Retrieve the "find" Term from a FindTaclet.
    JTerm
    translate(Taclet taclet, TermServices services)
    Translates a RewriteTaclet to a formula.
    protected JTerm
    translate(Sequent s, TermServices services)
    Translates a sequent to a term by using the following translations rules: T ==> D is translated to: And(T)->Or(D).
    And(s): conjunction between all formulae in set s.

  • Method Details

    • translate

      public JTerm translate(Taclet taclet, TermServices services) throws IllegalTacletException
      Translates a RewriteTaclet to a formula.
      Parameters:
      taclet - taclet to be translated.
      services - TODO
      Returns:
      returns the translation of the taclet.
      Throws:
      IllegalTacletException

    • getFindFromTaclet

      protected JTerm getFindFromTaclet(FindTaclet findTaclet)
      Retrieve the "find" Term from a FindTaclet.

      Originally, this simply calls FindTaclet.find(). Overriding classes may choose to garnish the result with additional information.

      Parameters:
      findTaclet - a non-null taclet instance
      Returns:
      the find clause of the argument

    • translate

      protected JTerm translate(Sequent s, TermServices services)
      Translates a sequent to a term by using the following translations rules: T ==> D is translated to: And(T)->Or(D).
      And(s): conjunction between all formulae in set s. Or(s): disjunction between all formulae in set s.
      Parameters:
      s - The sequent to be translated.
      services - TODO
      Returns:
      the resulting term of the translation or null if both antecedent and succendent are empty.
